metadata.description: Auxly skills: a bias-resistant multi-model planning council (→ vetted plan + branded static HTML) and a simple native-todo plan executor. No servers, no external deps.

plugins.name: auxly
plugins.description: Auxly Council (multi-model bias-resistant planning → final-plan.md + a self-contained branded plan.html you review in the browser) + Auxly Execute (Claude works the plan via its native todo list). Simple and stable: no servers, no external deps.
